title: Citrusy Tender Egyptian Lemon Pastry Pie
description: A citrusy and tender dessert designed to be enjoyed as a solo dinner dish featuring shortcrust pastry, marinated lemons, and dairy-free-friendly ingredients.
instructions: In a mixing bowl, combine flour and cubed butter. Using a pastry cutter or your fingers, cut the butter into the flour until it resembles coarse crumbs.
Gradually add ice water while stirring with a fork until dough comes together in a ball. Wrap in plastic wrap and chill for at least 30 minutes.
On a floured surface, roll out chilled dough to fit a 9-inch pie dish. Trim edges and transfer to the pie dish.
In a separate bowl, combine lemon juice, zest, salt, eggs, and dairy-free milk until well combined. Pour into prepared crust.
Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 40-45 minutes or until set and golden brown. Cool on a wire rack before serving.
